title: 《第九条》如何成为美国保守主义运动的工具
content: Title IX, originally intended to prevent sex‑based discrimination in educational programs, has been used by conservative groups to challenge and reshape policies on gender and sexual identity. By interpreting the law as a means to promote traditional gender roles, these groups have influenced court decisions, school policies, and public discourse, framing Title IX as a tool for advancing a conservative agenda that limits transgender rights and broader gender‑inclusive reforms.

title: 为了AI数据中心，马斯克和孟菲斯居民撕两年了
content:
我们已经习惯了和AI对话。 敲几下键盘，一个问题被迅速拆解、计算、生成答案。它看起来轻盈、即时，甚至有点不真实——像是从某个虚空被“召唤”出来的。

很少有人会去追问，这些答案是从哪里来的。

算力不是空气。模型不会自己运行。每一次生成背后，都对应着成百上千块GPU…

title: 字节，正在批量造富
content: ByteDance has doubled its internal equity program, holding biannual option repurchases that have risen 14–11% per six months. In late 2025 the company introduced “豆包股,” a virtual‑stock incentive linked to its AI model, with a 30% price jump in the first year. These moves, aimed at retaining talent, give employees regular “interest‑like” gains without a public listing, while the company continues to offer generous bonuses, raises, and broader stock‑based rewards.

title: 突发：OpenAI连失大将，Sora之父离职，IPO前夜风波不断
content: OpenAI is tightening its focus ahead of a planned IPO after a wave of high‑level departures. Bill Peebles and Kevin Weil announced exits, the Sora video project was paused, and the Prism science tool has been folded into Codex. CEO Sam Altman faces scrutiny over potential conflicts of interest, notably past attempts to involve OpenAI in Helion fusion funding and the Stoke Space partnership. The company is streamlining its product line to core, investment‑worthy projects.
eventKey: openai连失大将-sora之父离职-ipo前夜风波不断
normalizedTitle: 突发 openai连失大将 sora之父离职 ipo前夜风波不断

title: 刚刚，Claude推出“Figma杀手”，设计软件股暴跌
content: Anthropic has launched Claude Design, an AI‑powered tool that lets users generate and edit visual content such as prototypes, slides, and web pages via conversation, inline comments, and sliders. It exports designs in multiple formats and can hand off to Claude Code for development. The release triggered a sell‑off in Figma’s shares, reflecting market anxiety about AI disrupting design software, though the industry continues to integrate AI to enhance user experience.

title: 使用 auto-cpufreq 平衡 Linux 性能功耗
content: 在 Fedora Linux 下，调整系统使用 auto-cpufreq 速度和功耗优化器。 搭载 Intel Core Ultra 7 255H 处理器的设备，离电状态进行日常网页浏览、写作和听音乐等轻度任务时的功耗表现，基本维持在 10W 左右。

title: 2026 04 18 HackerNews
content: The 18 April 2026 Hacker News thread highlights a range of topics: OpenAI has upgraded Codex into a desktop assistant that can drive apps, browse the web, and run 90 + new plugins, raising questions about user experience and security. Anthropic’s Claude Design integrates visual models into collaborative design, sparking debate over interface homogenisation versus individuality. Conversations cover Asimov’s “The Last Question” and LLM uncertainty handling, the privacy risks of precise geolocation data and proposed bans, and the costs of Claude 4.7’s tokenizer. Other posts warn about “passive‑income” myths, critique diversity‑alleviating AGI trade‑offs, discuss US age‑verification bills, and expose marketing “psyops” that manufacture trends. The thread illustrates the rapid evolution of AI tools, regulatory concerns, and cultural impacts of tech.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 04 18 hackernews

content: U.S. stocks climbed higher on Friday, extending a three‑week surge and earning new record highs. The Dow rose 1.8%, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq each gained more than 1%. Investors welcomed the prospect of progress in the Iran‑U.S. war, which contributed to the market rally.

title: 7 家平台涉「幽灵外卖」被罚没近 36 亿元：拼多多 15.22 亿、美团 7.46 亿、阿里系 6.3 亿
content: In April 2024, the State Administration for Market Regulation fined seven e‑commerce platforms—Pinduoduo, Meituan, JD.com, Taobao Flash Sale, Douyin, Taobao, and Tmall—for “ghost delivery” violations. The administration revoked licenses, suspended new cake vendor listings for 3–9 months, and imposed a collective fine of 3.597 billion yuan, with 19.6874 million yuan levied on company leaders and food‑safety directors. The platforms were found to have weak permit checks, failed to verify qualifications, and neglected to regulate order‑transfer practices, leading to the removal of ghost shops and cessation of such collaborations.
eventKey: 家平台涉「幽灵外卖」被罚没近-拼多多-阿里系

title: 杭州六小龙之一群核科技港股上市，开盘大涨 170%
content: Qunhe Technology, one of Hangzhou’s “Six Little Dragons,” listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange today with a share price of HK$7.62. The stock closed at HK$20.62, up more than 170%. The IPO will offer approximately 161 million shares, raising up to HK$1.227 billion. Qunhe is a leading provider of space‑intelligence services, operating the global 3D interior platform 3D X and the overseas version Coohom, serving over 200 countries. Other Hangzhou startups in the group include Shendu Quesuo, Yushutong, Game Science, Yunshen Chu, and Qiangna Tech.

title: OpenAI 据悉将斥资超 200 亿美元购买 Cerebras 芯片并获得股份
content: OpenAI has agreed to spend more than $20 billion over three years to use Cerebras chips in its servers, potentially earning equity in the chip startup. In January, OpenAI also committed up to 750 MW of compute from Cerebras, worth over $10 billion. The deal may add up to 10 % equity in Cerebras, which plans an IPO in Q2 and a $3 billion raise next month. Cerebras, founded in 2015 and backed by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, is known for wafer‑scale engine chips.
eventKey: openai-据悉将斥资超-200-亿美元购买-cerebras-芯片并获得股份

title: OpenAI 推出药物研发 AI 模型 GPT-Rosalind 挑战谷歌
content: OpenAI released an early version of GPT‑Rosalind, an AI model aimed at accelerating drug discovery. The specialized model targets life‑science research and will be available to select corporate clients on a research preview basis, with initial users including Amgen, Moderna, and the Allen Institute. The launch joins efforts from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google to apply artificial intelligence to scientific and medical advancements.

title: Building an emoji list generator with the GitHub Copilot CLI
content: The blog post describes how the GitHub team created an emoji‑list generator during a live build session. Using the GitHub Copilot CLI, the author generated a terminal tool that lets users paste or type bullet points, automatically replaces them with relevant emojis via the Copilot SDK, and copies the result to the clipboard. Technologies used include OpenTUI for the terminal UI and clipboardy for clipboard access. The project is free, open source, and built with plan, autopilot, and multi‑model workflows.
eventKey: building-emoji-list-generator-github-copilot
normalizedTitle: building an emoji list generator with the github copilot cli

title: Anthropic 推出 Claude Design
content: Anthropic has released a new AI design tool named Claude Design, developed by Anthropic Labs. The launch follows a series of updates to Claude models, including Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, and the introduction of autonomous agents and code‑generation features. Claude Design aims to streamline visual and complex engineering tasks, complementing other recent additions such as voice mode, desktop controls, and a sponsorship program for core contributors.

title: Congrats to the Notion MCP Challenge Winners!
content: The Notion MCP Challenge announced its winners: first place, NoteRunway, an AI‑powered workspace manager that uses a hybrid API and MCP approach to keep Notion organized; runner‑ups, DevNotion, which turns weekly GitHub activity into a blog post and Notion planner, and Relay, an incident‑management assistant that documents incidents in real time via MCP. Winners receive $500, DEV++ subscriptions, and a badge; other participants earn a completion badge. The announcement also promotes upcoming DEV Weekend Earth Day and OpenClaw challenges with prize pools.
eventKey: congrats-notion-mcp-challenge-winners
normalizedTitle: congrats to the notion mcp challenge winners

title: Bringing more transparency to GitHub’s status page
content: GitHub is enhancing its status page to improve transparency and accuracy. It introduces a “Degraded Performance” tier, a three‑level incident classification, and publishes per‑service uptime for the last 90 days. Uptime calculations use severity weights: Major Outage 100%, Partial Outage 30%, Degraded Performance 0%. A new “Copilot AI Model Providers” component will report model‑provider outages separately from the broader Copilot service. These changes aim to give users clearer, more actionable service health information.
eventKey: bringing-more-transparency-github’s-status-page
normalizedTitle: bringing more transparency to github’s status page
